script.name: plugin.logistics.getdata
script.sourceplaintext:
* make sure the data exists $page.id = get global variable: name='pageid.guilds'
$Guilds.Data = get global variable: name='guilds.data' $logistics.data = $Guilds.Data['logistics'] $network.table = $logistics.data['networks'] do if $a.network $network.data = $logistics.data['networks'][$a.network]
$var = sprintf: fmt='sort.%s.%s', $a.menu, $a.table, null, null, null $var.dir = sprintf: fmt='sortdir.%s.%s', $a.menu, $a.table, null, null, null $var.search = sprintf: fmt='search.%s.%s', $a.menu, $a.table, null, null, null $check.exists = [FALSE]
$sort.value = $logistics.data[$var] skip if $sort.value $sort.value = 1 $search.value = $logistics.data[$var.search] if $search.value skip if get length of string $search.value $search.value = null end
$sort.table = table alloc @ $array = [THIS] -> call script plugin.guilds.gettable : MenuID=$a.menu Table=$a.table if $array $heading.data = $array[0] else $heading.data = null end
if $a.menu == 'ship.menu' AND $a.table == 'ships' $table.ships = $network.data['ships'] $key = get next key: table=$network.table key=null while $key $table = $network.table[$key]['ships'] $table.ships = merge tables, $table.ships, $table, null, null, null $key = get next key: table=$network.table key=$key end $table.ships[[PLAYERSHIP]] = [TRUE]
$sorted.array = get ship array: of race Player class/type=Moveable Ship $i = size of array $sorted.array while $i dec $i = $obj = $sorted.array[$i] do if $obj -> is of class Drone continue do if $obj -> is of class Special Drone continue do if $table.ships[$obj] continue do if $obj ->is being managed continue gosub sub.DoSort end
else if $a.menu == 'station.editmenu' $array = $network.data['stations'][$a.extra] $table = $array[2] gosub sub.DoSortTable
else if $a.menu == 'station.menu' $table = $network.data['stations'] if $a.table == 'factories' $array = get station array: of race Player class/type=Factory else if $a.table == 'complex' $array = get station array: of race Player class/type=Complex Hub else if $a.table == 'docks' $array = get station array: of race Player class/type=Dock end $i = size of array $array while $i dec $i = $obj = $array[$i] do if $table[$obj] continue skip if $obj -> exists continue if $a.table == 'factories' do if $obj ->get complex hangar continue do if $obj -> is of class Complex Hub continue end gosub sub.DoSort end
else if $a.menu == 'logistics.mainmenu' AND $a.table == 'ships' $check.exists = [TRUE] $table = $network.data['ships'] gosub sub.DoSortTable
else if $a.menu == 'logistics.mainmenu' AND $a.table == 'docks' $table = $network.data['stations'] $obj = get next key: table=$table key=null while $obj if $obj -> exists do if $obj -> is of class Dock gosub sub.DoSort end $obj = get next key: table=$table key=$obj end else if $a.menu == 'logistics.mainmenu' AND $a.table == 'complex' $table = $network.data['stations'] $obj = get next key: table=$table key=null while $obj if $obj -> exists do if $obj -> is of class Complex Hub gosub sub.DoSort end $obj = get next key: table=$table key=$obj end else if $a.menu == 'logistics.mainmenu' AND $a.table == 'factories' $table = $network.data['stations'] $obj = get next key: table=$table key=null while $obj if $obj -> exists if $obj -> is of class Factory if not $obj -> is of class Complex Hub skip if $obj ->get complex hangar gosub sub.DoSort end end end $obj = get next key: table=$table key=$obj end end
if size of table $sort.table $sorted.array = sort table keys by value: table=$sort.table do if $logistics.data[$var.dir] $sorted.array = reverse array $sorted.array return $sorted.array end
return null
sub.DoSortTable: $obj = get next key: table=$table key=null while $obj $exists = $obj -> exists skip if $check.exists $exists = [TRUE] if $exists if not $table.exclude gosub sub.DoSort else if not $table.exclude[$obj] gosub sub.DoSort end end $obj = get next key: table=$table key=$obj end $table.exclude = null endsub
sub.DoSort: if $heading.data $tmp = $sort.value - 1 if $tmp >= 0 $tmp2 = size of array $heading.data if $tmp < $tmp2 $text = $heading.data[$tmp] gosub sub.GetSortValue $sort.table[$obj] = $text end end end endsub
sub.GetSortValue: @ $text = [THIS] -> call script lib.cycrow.table.data : Column=$text Extra Info=$a.network For Sorting=[TRUE] Item=$obj Item2=$a.extra endsub
return null

line.text: sort table keys by value: table=
